prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is S-201 Rebar placement within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.2 Reinforcing. The observed field condition is: lap splice too short (count bar diameters - ME). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T3 S-201 Measurement & estimation
